items.title: S&P 500 flashes sell signals — options traders are bracing for wild swings in Apple, Meta and Microsoft
items.description: Nervous investors set the stage for massive post-earnings moves in Wall Street’s biggest stocks.

items.title: Lockheed Martin’s stock skyrockets as push to build more missiles faster pays off
items.description: Lockheed Martin’s stock jumps as a ramp up in missile production helped lead to an earnings beat and raise.

items.title: Japan’s $1.8 trillion pension giant might bring money home. That could jolt U.S. stocks and the Fed.
items.description: Japan’s pension titan selling foreign assets could push U.S. yields up and sap demand for the dollar.

items.title: T-Mobile’s stock sinks despite customers pouring into premium plans
items.description: The wireless carrier has focused on amassing “higher quality accounts” after introducing new plans last year.

items.title: The rising cost of capital for companies today is starting to spook the stock market: ‘The worry is the spending might not pay off’
items.description: Alphabet says it plans to throw even more money at the AI buildout. The Iran war, oil back at $100 a barrel and rising bond yields make it all the more difficult for the market to stomach.

items.title: Alphabet’s massive profit growth is ‘illusory’, as SpaceX and Anthropic help mask a historic cash drain
items.description: Earnings quadrupled on paper, but an analyst says that performance was propped up by unrealized gains from equity investments.

items.title: A ‘generational buying opportunity’ guarantees inflation plus 3% a year, says this hedge-fund manager
items.description: Bob Elliott sparks buzz highlighting the bargain level of TIPS.

items.title: Imax’s CEO says it’s time to hike prices as tickets to ‘The Odyssey’ resell for $1,000
items.description: People are flying across the country to see Christopher Nolan’s epic fantasy blockbuster “The Odyssey,” the first full-length movie shot only with Imax cameras.

items.title: How to find the best mortgage rate — it could save you $3,300 a year
items.description: Buyers who skip comparison shopping often end up considerably overpaying for their mortgage.

items.title: Global oil tops $100, settles at 2-month high after Houthis strike Saudi tankers and Trump threatens ‘military punishment’ on Iran
items.description: Oil futures climbed sharply Thursday, with global benchmark Brent crude topping $100 a barrel for the first time since May, after Yemen’s Houthi militants claimed attacks on two Saudi Arabian tankers
